prompt: Write a short poem (8–16 lines) about the feeling of finishing a long project. Any form you like.
response:
The final page is set, the final line  
A work of art, a labor of time
The tired mind finds peace in the sleep
While the newly birthing work lies still in the deep

Thoughts raced and swirled, ideas clashed and flew
Through day and night, the vision and you 
Compelled by wonder, by a dream so bold
The journey demanding, yet rich to unfold

Now as the sun rises, a new day dawns
The project complete, a mark it has drawn 
On parchment and stone, on heart and on soul
A masterpiece wrought, a story told.
